rationale.D1: Confirmed 10 IO interfaces (BiscuitIO, CoralIO, ClimbIO, AlgaeIO, ElevatorIO, FunnelIO, SwerveIO, LaserIO, BattMonIO, ExampleIO) each with exactly one hardware implementation and zero IOSim variants; the pattern is the team's consistent default (not partial), but the absence of any swappable sim implementations keeps this below level 3.
rationale.D2: Confirmed a full centralized RobotStateSubsystem (1369 lines) with 30-state RobotStates enum, guarded transitions (needSafeAlgaeTransfer), futureState queuing, goal-request API (toStow/toReefAlign/toPlaceCoral/etc.) that fans out to all 10+ subsystems — solidly level 3.
rationale.D3: No simulationPeriodic found, no WPILib physics sim classes (ElevatorSim, DCMotorSim, etc.), no maple-sim, no IOSim implementations; simulation is absent.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; CI workflow runs ./gradlew build only, not ./gradlew test; no @Test annotations found anywhere.
rationale.D5: Confirmed @AutoLog Inputs structs on 10 IO interfaces and Logger.processInputs() calls in every mechanism subsystem (CoralSubsystem:124, BiscuitSubsystem:122, ClimbSubsystem:150, AlgaeSubsystem:115, ElevatorSubsystem:68, FunnelSubsystem:39, DriveSubsystem:450, BattMonSubsystem:30, LaserSubsystem:23) plus extensive Logger.recordOutput usage — full AK coverage.
rationale.D6: Confirmed Choreo.loadTrajectory() called in PathHandler.java and DriveAlgaeWaitAutonServoCommand; 79 .traj files actively referenced; TagAlignSubsystem provides on-the-fly drive-to-target alignment using pose estimation; no PathPlanner.
rationale.D7: Confirmed 5-camera WallEye vision system with adaptive std-dev matrix, pose rejection (camsWithinField), per-camera yaw trust control (trustedCameraYawIdx), and addVisionMeasurement with stdDevs called from VisionSubsystem:538; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState world-model class, so capped at 3.
rationale.D8: Confirmed 4 seasons of tracked repos (2022-2025), CI workflow (build only, not test), Spotless formatter in build.gradle, rich README with state machine diagrams and control maps, but no separate library repo and CI does not run tests.
